• a-cl-loggerstars12 - Logging library providing context sensitive logging of more than just strings to more than just local files or output streams. Features logstash support, json support, logger hierarchies, context sensitive logging, objects printed as an inspectable presentation,…
• The death of Agile, by Allen Holub - How "Agile" has moved away from the basic principles of agility, and what we need to do to fix things 🎥.
• enforce-insert-issue-number - Make sure user did not delete the ISSUE-[#] string that was generated by prepare-commit-msg/insert-issue-number.hook.
• delete-pyc-files - Delete all .pyc files every time a new branch is checked out.
• new-branch-alert - Display a message when a new branch is checked out for the first time.
• update-server-info - Prepare a packed repository for use over dumb transports (e.g. http).
• format-code - Run command to format code and re-add any files modified after formatting.
• search-term - Fail commit if a specific term is found in the code.
• spell-check-md-files - Check files with .md extension for spelling errors.
• verify-name-and-email - Fail commit if user.name or user.email is incorrect.
• include-git-diff-name-status - Include the output of "git diff --name-status -r" into the message, just before the "git status" output.
• insert-issue-number - Insert issue number to beginning of the commit message.
• prevent-bad-push - Prevent push of commits where the log message starts with "WIP" (work in progress).
• prevent-rebase - Prevent topic branches that are already merged to 'next' branch from getting rebased, because allowing it would result in rebasing already published history.
• fsmonitor-watchman - Output to stdout all files that have been modified since a given time.
• update - Block unannotated tags from entering.

• Pdockerstars4 - A simple tool to manage and maintain Docker for personal projects by @g31s
• trivial-utf8 - A small library for doing UTF-8-based I/O. BSD.
• DUnit. [Delphi] Unit Testing Framework, that has been the standard testing framework for years, the Delphi IDE now ships with this library.

• TCommandLineReaderstars12. [Delphi] [FPC] This unit provides an advanced, platform-independent command line parser for Lazarus and Delphi. It checks for allowed options, automatically prints a help with a list of all of them, and - contrary to the parser in the rtl - behaves the same on Windows and Linux.
• CommandLineParserstars70. [Delphi] Simple Command Line Options Parser - spawned from the DUnitX Project.
• GpCommandLineParser. [Delphi] Attribute based command line parser.
• JPL.CmdLineParser. [Delphi] [FPC] Command-line parser for Delphi and Free Pascal
• Common Lisp Standard Draft (pdf) - The standard draft of the Common Lisp specifications, in a well formatted PDF with a sidebar.
• Twillstars2.3k
• Git hooks and practical uses. Yes, even on Windows.
• BioC-BioGRID - paper - 120 full text articles annotated for PPI and genetic interactions. Used in the BioCreative V BioC task.
• CRAFTstars52 - paper - 67 full-text biomedical articles annotated in a variety of ways, including for concepts and coreferences. Now on version 3.
• elixire - Simple yet advanced screenshot uploading and link shortening service. (Source Code, Clients) AGPL-3.0 Python
• DocPHT - With DocPHT you can take notes and quickly document anything and without the use of any database. (Demo, Source Codestars96) MIT PHP
• Calagator - Event aggregator. (Source Codestars387) MIT Ruby
• dudle - Online scheduling application. (Demo, Source Codestars247) AGPL-3.0 Ruby

• UMLS Metathesaurus - paper - Mappings between >3.8 million concepts, 14 million concept names, and >200 sources of biomedical vocabulary and identifiers. It's big. It may help to prepare a subset of the Metathesaurus with the MetamorphoSys installation tool but we're still talking about ~30 Gb of disk space required for the 2019 release. See the manual here. Requires UTS account.
• mimic-codestars1.3k - Code associated with the MIMIC-III dataset (see below). Includes some helpful tutorials.
• OHSUMED - paper - 348,566 MEDLINE entries (title and sometimes abstract) from between 1987 and 1991. Includes MeSH labels. Primarily of historical significance.
• RxNorm - paper - Normalized names for clinical drugs and drug packs, with combined ingredients, strengths, and form, and assigned types from the Semantic Network (see below). Released monthly.

• UMLS Semantic Network - paper - Lists of 133 semantic types and 54 semantic relationships covering biomedical concepts and vocabulary. Is the Metathesaurus too complex for your needs? Try this. Does not require UTS account to download.
• Word Sense Disambiguation (WSD) - paper - 203 ambiguous words and 37,888 automatically extracted instances of their use in biomedical research publications. Requires UTS account.
• NebulaGraphstars6.2k - A high performance distributed Graph database.

• BioInfer - paper - 1,100 sentences from biomedical research abstracts annotated for relationships (including PPI), named entities, and syntactic dependencies. Additional information and download links are here.
• IEPA - paper - 486 sentences from biomedical research abstracts annotated for pairs of co-occurring chemicals, including proteins (hence, PPI annotations).

• LLL - paper - 77 sentences from research articles about the bacterium Bacillus subtilis, annotated for protein–gene interactions (so, fairly close to PPI annotations). Additional information is here.
• AIMed - paper - 225 MEDLINE abstracts annotated for PPI.
• Grokking Simplicity teaches functional programming from first principles. It uses JavaScript for all code examples and it uses real-world scenarios. By Eric Normand (2019)
• Playlist - Programando en Blazor - [Spanish] Series of videos about Blazor.
• windows-title - Dynamically updates terminal window title with current directory and the last command run.
• celestialorbstars1 - Powerline-inspired theme by @celestialorb. Includes git status decorations, Kubernetes cluster information (if any), current AWS profile and region, and active virtualenv.
• NGINX Conference 2018 Videos
• Interview with the creator of Nginx

nodes.itemHTML: • Tokumei - Anonymous microblogging platform. (Source Code) ISC rc

• CaptainHookstars519 - Git hooks manager for PHP developers.

• Dockerfile Generatorstars96 dfg is both a Go library and an executable that produces valid Dockerfiles using various input channels.

• Build a one-on-one Android chat app using Kotlin - Build a one-one-one Android chat app in Kotlin within few minutes using CometChat Pro. This tutorial discusses the features such as login, getting list of contacts, user presence indicators, sending/receiving messages etc.
• ember-local-storagestars215 - The addon provides a storage for computed property that returns a proxy and persists the changes to localStorage or sessionStorage.
• NewRelic plugin - A complete plugin that enables full New Relic integration for a CakePHP application, including CLI naming, exceptions sending, custom timings, etc.
